blur_detection.description: The text is sharp and clearly defined with no visible blur.

contrast_assessment.description: Excellent contrast between text and background, ensuring clear text recognition.

glare_identification.description: No glare or bright spots detected that obscure text or important document areas.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discolorations affecting document readability.

tears_or_folds.description: No visible tears, creases, folds, or wrinkles that distort text.

cut_off_detection.description: No document edges are cut off, and the image frame includes all important portions.

missing_sections.description: No missing or incomplete sections identified in the receipt/invoice.

obstructions.description: No objects, fingers, shadows, or other elements obstructing document content.

classification.reasoning: The document contains all necessary fields to be classified as an expense document. It includes supplier details, consumer details, transaction amount, transaction date, invoice/receipt number, tax information, payment method, and item description line items.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: All required fields are present, confirming this is an expense document.
